empty_clients: No clients found. Clients appear from saved profiles or once linked to a transaction.
capture_subtitle: Before/after photos are saved to the client’s profile.
cam_err_unavailable: Camera API not available in this browser. Use the upload button instead.
cam_err_denied: Camera permission denied. Enable camera access in your browser settings, or use the upload button.
cam_err_notfound: No camera found on this device. Use the upload button to add a photo.
cam_err_inuse: Camera is already in use by another app. Close it and try again.
cam_err_generic: Could not start the camera. Use the upload button instead.
notes_placeholder: Allergies, preferences, scalp sensitivity, conversation notes…
